problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: The key to What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? is Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) — specifically Two-dimensional material stacking — which would help 700,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
